| list1title = Early history | list1name = Early history | list1 = ; [[Spring and Autumn period]] * [[:en:Confucius|Confucius]]

; [[Three Fundamental Bonds and Five Constant Virtues|''Sangang Wuchang'']] * [[Li (Confucianism)|''Li'']] * [[Ren (Confucianism)|''Ren'']] * [[Xin (heart-mind)|''Xin'']] * [[Yi (Confucianism)|''Yi'']]

| list1title = Early history | list1name = Early history | list1 = ; [[:en:Spring and Autumn period|Spring and Autumn period]] * [[:en:Confucius|Confucius]]

; [[:en:Three Fundamental Bonds and Five Constant Virtues|''Sangang Wuchang'']] * [[:en:Li (Confucianism)|''Li'']] * [[:en:Ren (Confucianism)|''Ren'']] * [[:en:Xin (heart-mind)|''Xin'']] * [[:en:Yi (Confucianism)|''Yi'']]
